hero.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
hero.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

aries.general: Today brings an opportunity for growth, both personally and professionally. Seize the moment.
aries.love: Your charm is magnetic today. Allow your natural charisma to shine in your romantic interactions.
aries.career: Collaboration is key at work today. Team efforts will yield impressive results.

taurus.general: Stability and security are on your mind. Focus on building the foundations for your future.
taurus.love: Communication in your relationship is essential today; be open about your feelings.
taurus.career: A financial opportunity may arise. Evaluate it carefully before making decisions.

gemini.general: Your curiosity is high today. Explore new ideas or interests.
gemini.love: Expect a pleasant surprise in your love life. Stay open to what comes your way.
gemini.career: Networking can lead to unexpected benefits. Attend events or engage with colleagues.

cancer.general: Emotional awareness is heightened today. Pay attention to your inner feelings.
cancer.love: Nurturing and caring for your partner will strengthen your bond.
cancer.career: Trust your instincts in complex work situations; your intuition is sharp.

leo.general: Leadership opportunities may arise. Be ready to step into the spotlight.
leo.love: Passion is in the air; enjoy moments of closeness with your partner.
leo.career: Your ideas will gain recognition. Share your innovative solutions with confidence.

virgo.general: Take time for self-care today; a bit of pampering will rejuvenate your spirit.
virgo.love: Practicality in romance may lead to advancements in your relationship.
virgo.career: Organizational skills will help you tackle your tasks efficiently today.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
professional.author: Winston S. Churchill

professional.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
professional.author: Norman Vaughan

professional.text: You miss 100% of the shots you don’t take.
professional.author: Wayne Gretzky

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

motivation.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivation.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
motivation.author: Winston S. Churchill

motivation.text: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
motivation.author: Peter Drucker

captions.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
captions.author: Charlie Chaplin

captions.text: Why fit in when you were born to stand out?
captions.author: Dr. Seuss

captions.text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
captions.author: Oscar Wilde

captions.text: If you want to live a happy life, tie it to a goal, not to people or things.
captions.author: Albert Einstein

captions.text: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
captions.author: Mae West

captions.text: Life is short, and it's up to you to make it sweet.
captions.author: Sarah Louise Delany

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The real danger is not that computers will begin to think like men, but that men will begin to think like computers.
tech.author: Sydney J. Harris

tech.text: Technology is a word that describes something that doesn’t work yet.
tech.author: Douglas Adams

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

fun.text: I am on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I used to play piano by ear, but now I use my hands.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I would avoid the sushi if I was you. It’s a little fishy.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: Faith does not eliminate questions. But faith knows where to take them.
faith.author: Elisabeth Elliot

faith.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
faith.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

faith.text: Don’t let your faith be limited by your present circumstances.
faith.author: Jentezen Franklin

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: Life is really simple, but we insist on making it complicated.
wisdom.author: Confucius

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: To know what is right and not do it is the worst cowardice.
wisdom.author: Confucius
